title: Callbacks and Callback Hell
description: Learn about callback functions and the pyramid of doom.

slides.title: What is a Callback? 📞
Callback Example
Callback Hell – The Pyramid of Doom 😈

quizData.question: What is the main problem with deeply nested callbacks?

options.text: They lead to unreadable code (callback hell)

quizData.explanation: Deep nesting makes code hard to read, maintain, and debug – known as callback hell.
